text: Lesson 39
zh: 第39课

text: Nothing to worry about
zh: 没什么好担心的

text: What was the differnce between Bruce's behaviour and that of other people?
zh: 布鲁斯的行为和其他人的有什么不同?

text: The rough road across the plain soon became so bad that we tried to get Bruce to drive back to the village we had come from.
zh: 穿越平原的崎岖道路很快变得非常糟糕,我们试图让布鲁斯把车开回我们出发的那个村庄。

text: Even though the road was littered with boulders and pitted with holes, Bruce was not in the least perturbed.
zh: 尽管路上到处是巨石,还布满坑洼,布鲁斯却丝毫不为所动。

text: Glancing at his map, he informed us that the next village was a mere twenty miles away.
zh: 他瞥了一眼地图,告诉我们下一个村庄只有二十英里远。

text: It was not that Bruce always underestimated difficulties.
zh: 并不是布鲁斯总是低估困难。

text: He simply had no sense of danger at all.
zh: 他只是完全没有危险意识。

text: No matter what the conditions were, he believed that a car should be driven as fast as it could possibly go.
zh: 无论条件如何,他都认为车应该尽可能开得快。

text: As we bumped over the dusty track, we swerved to avoid large boulders.
zh: 我们的车颠簸着驶过尘土飞扬的小路,不得不左右转弯以避开大石头。

text: The wheels scooped up stones which hammered ominously under the car.
zh: 车轮卷起石块,石块在车底发出不祥的敲击声。

text: We felt sure that sooner or later a stone would rip a hole in our petrol tank or damage the engine.
zh: 我们确信迟早会有石块划破油箱或损坏发动机。

text: Because of this, we kept looking back, wondering if we were leaving a trail of oil and petrol behind us.
zh: 正因如此,我们不断回头张望,担心身后会留下一道油迹。

text: What a relief it was when the boulders suddenly disappeared,
zh: 当巨石突然消失时,我们真是松了一口气,

text: giving way to a stretch of plain where the only obstacles were clumps bushes.
zh: 眼前变成了一片平地,唯一的障碍就是一丛丛灌木。

text: But there was worse to come. Just ahead of us there was a huge fissure.
zh: 但更糟的还在后头。就在我们前方,有一道巨大的裂缝。

text: In response to renewed pleadings, Bruce stopped.
zh: 在我们再三恳求下,布鲁斯停了车。

text: Though we all got out to examine the fissure, he remained in the car.
zh: 我们都下车查看那道裂缝,他却仍坐在车里。

text: We informed him that the fissure extended for fifty yards and was two feet wide and four feet deep.
zh: 我们告诉他,这道裂缝长达五十码,宽两英尺,深四英尺。

text: Even this had no effect.
zh: 即便如此也没起作用。

text: Bruce went into a low gear and drove at a terrifying speed,
zh: 布鲁斯挂上低速挡,以惊人的速度开车,

text: keeping the front wheels astride the crack as he followed its zigzag course.
zh: 让前轮跨在裂缝两侧,顺着它曲折的走向行驶。

text: Before we had time to worry about what might happen, we were back on the plain again.
zh: 我们还没来得及担心会发生什么,车子就已经重新回到平地上了。

text: Bruce consulted the map once more and told us that the village was now only fifteen miles away.
zh: 布鲁斯又查看了一下地图,告诉我们村庄现在只剩十五英里了。

text: Our next obstacle was a shallow pool of water about half a mile across.
zh: 我们遇到的下一个障碍是一片大约半英里宽的浅水潭。

text: Bruce charged at it, but in the middle, the car came to a grinding halt.
zh: 布鲁斯猛冲过去,可车子却在水潭中央猛地熄火了。

text: A yellow light on the dashboard flashed angrily and Bruce cheerfully announced that there was no oil in the engine!
zh: 仪表盘上的黄灯急促地闪烁着,布鲁斯却兴高采烈地宣布,发动机里没油了!
